references.title: An Automatic Recommendation Process to Generate Learning Paths Based on Learner Preferences
references.journal: International Journal of Information and Education Technology

annotations.text: Recommender systems offer the promise of generating personalized learning pathways in distance learning. The authors propose an approach that computes scores for topics and asks users to score different topics according to their interest and uses these scores to recommend personalized learning pathways.
The aim of the approach is to make recommendations to each learner on courses they may wish to take. No comment on whether the effectiveness of the recommender is mentioned in the abstract.
